mapper.select: SELECT co.cl_order_id, c.client_name, p.product_id, p.product_name, cod.order_qty, cod.detail_id, COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(remaining_qty) FROM ( SELECT pi.inbound_qty - COALESCE(SUM(po.outbound_qty), 0) AS remaining_qty FROM product_inbound pi LEFT JOIN product_outbound po ON pi.product_id = po.product_id AND pi.lot_no = po.lot_no WHERE pi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY pi.inbound_id, pi.inbound_qty, pi.expire_date HAVING remaining_qty > 0 ) AS available ), 0) AS stock_qty FROM client_order_detail cod JOIN client_order co ON cod.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id JOIN client c ON co.client_id = c.client_id JOIN product p ON cod.product_id = p.product_id WHERE co.cl_order_status = 'CONFIRMED' AND (cod.detail_status IS NULL OR cod.detail_status != 'SHIPPED') GROUP BY co.cl_order_id, c.client_name, p.product_id, p.product_name, cod.order_qty, cod.detail_id

SELECT cod.detail_id AS detailId, cod.product_id, cod.order_qty, co.cl_order_id AS clOrderId, c.client_name AS clientName, p.product_name, COALESCE(ps.stock_qty, 0) AS stockQty FROM client_order_detail cod JOIN client_order co ON cod.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id JOIN client c ON co.client_id = c.client_id JOIN product p ON cod.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN product_stock ps ON cod.product_id = ps.product_id WHERE cod.detail_id = #{orderDetailId}

SELECT pi.lot_no AS lotNo, (pi.inbound_qty - IFNULL(SUM(po.outbound_qty), 0)) AS remainingQty FROM product_inbound pi LEFT JOIN product_outbound po ON pi.product_id = po.product_id AND pi.lot_no = po.lot_no WHERE pi.product_id = #{productId} GROUP BY pi.lot_no, pi.inbound_qty, pi.expire_date HAVING remainingQty > 0 ORDER BY pi.expire_date ASC

SELECT cod.detail_id, cod.cl_order_id, cod.product_id, p.product_name, cod.order_qty, COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(pi.inbound_qty - IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(po.outbound_qty) FROM product_outbound po WHERE po.product_id = pi.product_id AND po.lot_no = pi.lot_no ), 0)) FROM product_inbound pi WHERE pi.product_id = cod.product_id ), 0) AS stock_qty FROM client_order_detail cod JOIN product p ON cod.product_id = p.product_id WHERE cod.cl_order_id = #{clOrderId}
